sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6830" key="a)nakto/reos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνακτόρεος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n6830.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀνακτόριος</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the emperor,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐχθρός</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.350</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
